name: Battery hold then dispatch (active-power setpoint)
hypothesis: A VPP holds a battery at zero, then dispatches a fixed export; each setpoint must read back as APPLIED, not merely accepted.
expected: 704 WSet reads back 0 during the hold and the dispatched watts after dispatch, within the SLA.
fix: If WSet never converges, look at the 704 WSet/WSet_SF projection and the reconciler's setpoint path.
notes: Live/battery campaign: a battery mbapsdev (or lexa-gw southbound) on unit 3. Validated at load in every build; executed on the bench. Not run against the solar-only hermetic loopback.
